name: Mini Almond Cheesecakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sugar (or 1 package of sugar substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the ground almonds and melted margarine in a small bowl.
2. Press the mixture evenly onto the bottoms of 12 paper-lined baking cups (muffin tins).
3. In a small saucepan, soften the gelatin by stirring it with cold water until dissolved.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese, milk, sugar, and almond extract at medium speed using an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Stir in the dissolved gelatin.
6. Pour the mixture into the baking cups and freeze until firm.
7. Place fresh peach slices in a food processor or blender container and process until smooth.
8. Spoon the peach puree onto individual plates.
9. Remove the cheesecakes from the freezer 10 minutes before serving.
10. Peel off the paper liners.
11. Invert the cheesecakes onto the plates.
12. Garnish with additional peach slices, raspberries, and fresh mint leaves, if desired.
Note: For a sweeter peach puree, add sugar to taste.
